ION – Investor Presentation

WHAT IS ION

ION is a wearable media platform powered by smart screens and a connected app.

It allows brands to deliver targeted advertising in real-world environments while enabling users to earn rewards through participation.

Problem

The challenges in modern advertising

  • Digital advertising is oversaturated
  • Outdoor advertising lacks targeting and interaction
  • Brands struggle to capture real attention
Solution

ION turns movement into a media channel

  • Ads are displayed on mobile screens
  • Managed and targeted via app
  • Real engagement with users
ION ECOSYSTEM

WHERE ION
CREATES VALUE

ION reaches audiences where traditional ads don't exist.

🎪 Events & Festivals🏬 Shopping Malls🎓 Universities🌳 Parks & Public Spaces🚌 City Streets & Transport

In addition to users, venues can also use wearable formats, including vests, to run their own activations, engage people, and create additional revenue opportunities.

Protected Technology

Intellectual
Property

ION is built on patented technology covering wearable screens and targeted advertising systems.

Validation

Business
Model

ION connects brands, creators, businesses, and real-world spaces.
ION is not just a product — it's a new environment where different industries meet and grow.

Connected App

Targeted advertising capabilities managed directly from the platform.

Media Channel

SaaS
